scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
